raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ka mehs muhfas Mei-
tas teem Laudim tahs Sem-
mes ne gribbetum doht/ nedg
winnu Meitas muhfeem Deh-
keem nemt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee Laudis tahs
Semnes Prezzes/ un wiſſadu
Labbibu atwestu SwehDeena
pahrdoht/ ka mehs no teem
Swehdeena/ jeb kahdős zittős
Swehteős ne gribbetum jent.
Un ka mehs to feptitu Gaddu
gribhetum par Waffas-Gaddu
turreht/ un wiſſadu Nasiu at-
laift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tad eezehlam mehs
Bauftus preeſsch mums/ ka
mehs gribbetum ikgaddus to tre-
schu Daltu weena Sibketa doht
pee tahs Kalposchanas muhfu
Deewa Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Par teem preeſschleeſka-
mahm Maisehm/ un to nemitte-
jamu Ehdamo-Uppuri/ un par to
nemittejamu Dedſamo- Uppuri
to Swehdeenu/ jauno Mehne-
fhu/ nospreeftu Swehtkn/ un
par tahin Swehtahn Leetahn/un
par teem Grehku- Uppureem/
Salihdsinafchanu darriht par I-
sraeltu/ un par wiſſu Darbu
muhfu Deewa Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Miehs arridosan meflojam
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka mehs arridsan te
Pirmajus muhfas Semmes/
tohs Pirmajus wiſſu Angtu
wiſſadeem Kohkeem gribbeti
nest/ uhs ta KUNGA Nam
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tohs Pirmdsimu
schus muhfu Dehlu/ un mu
Lohpu/ itt ka tas Bauſlibā ra
ſtihts stahw; Un ka mehs to
pirmdsimmutchus muhfu We
schu/ un muhfu fiſſu Lohpu gr
betum uhs muhfu Deewa Na
mu pre teem Preestereem ne
kas muhfu Deewa Nainā kalp
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ka mehs tohs Pirn
jus muhfu Mihklas/ un mut
Pazelfchanas-Uppuru/ un to
Angtus wiſſadu Kohku/ Wi
nu un Etju gribbetum pee tee
Preestereem nest/ muhfu Deet
Namma Rambards. Un to
Defmitus muhfas Semnes p
teem Levitteem/ un ka fcheem
witeein bija to Defmitu Tee
dabbuht wiſſos Pillsfahtōs mu
fas Apkohpfchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ka weens Preesteri
Adroza Dehls/ pee teem Lev-
teem buhtu/ ka tee Lewiti to de
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
